reference_answer: Ganesh Meti is a Full Stack AI Engineer, Software Engineer, and product-focused builder with experience building end-to-end applications using React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and REST APIs.

query: What are some of the key projects developed by Ganesh Meti?
reference_answer: Key projects developed by Ganesh Meti include an AI Job Coach, PDF Summary Chat, Forever Clothing Platform, and AI Video to Quiz Generator.
Ganesh Meti has worked as a Full Stack Developer Intern at Annam.AI IIT Ropar and Colt Assist.

query: Which university is Ganesh Meti associated with?
reference_answer: Ganesh Meti is currently pursuing a Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science at Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU).
